name: LAMINATE 10MM CLASSIC OAK
description: Classic Oak Laminate Flooring brings the timeless beauty of natural oak into your home. With a 10MM thickness and an integrated sound-dampening pad, this laminate is both durable and comfortable underfoot. Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, and high-traffic areas.

name: LAMINATE 10MM RUSTIC PINE
description: Rustic Pine Laminate features realistic wood grain textures and a distressed look. The AC4 wear rating ensures it can handle active households with pets and children. It clicks together easily for a fast installation.

name: LAMINATE 12MM PREMIUM HICKORY
description: Premium Hickory Laminate offers superior stability and a solid feel with its 12MM thickness. The deep embossing closely mimics real hand-scraped hardwood. Waterproof top coating protects against everyday spills.

name: LAMINATE 12MM MODERN ASH
description: Brighten up your space with Modern Ash. This 12MM laminate provides an ultra-realistic matte finish and painted beveled edges for a luxurious look. Highly scratch-resistant and suitable for both residential and light commercial use.

name: LAMINATE 12MM URBAN WALNUT
description: Urban Walnut combines rich, dark tones with exceptional durability. The 12MM core minimizes hollow sounds when walking, providing a true hardwood experience without the high maintenance.
